narrative_beat: Tela preta absoluta com um feixe vertical dourado descendo — partícula de brasa se desfazendo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a single thin vertical shaft of golden light descending into absolute black void
subject.focal_point: one orange ember particle dissolving at the center-bottom of the beam
subject.secondary: Total emptiness around the beam. No human figures. Silent visual.

environment.location: pure black void with no recognizable location

composition.rule: centered vertical symmetry, negative space dominant
composition.foreground: black void with single glowing ember
composition.midground: vertical golden beam piercing the darkness

lighting.key_light: single narrow golden beam from above

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, fine dust particles near beam

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
